title: Uppsala Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Uppsala with a Z-Score of -4.14. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Uppsala are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has led to a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 15.5 GG, indicating a substantial need for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 74% and the wind speed is moderate at 6.8 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
